textPlain: This is an excellent library! I only wish it had react-native support.I've worked on a few prototype react directed acyclical diagram libraries. jsplumb-react, react-yad, and recently @lincle.@lincle is my most recent and first attempt at supporting react-native. I tried leveraging existing interactive libraries. I was also inspired by react-flow's minimap. It is still a prototype and needs documentation but works well. I'm realizing now the demo isn't working but the demo source should hopefully give an example of how to use it.https://gitlab.com/digested/lincle
